nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI like copilot to refactor code sometimes because it helps me with repetitions

nodes.label: AI capability for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I let AI handle more complex tasks and refine them later

nodes.label: AI code quality and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: sometimes the quality of the code produced is not great

nodes.label: AI as time-saving refactoring tool
nodes.label_negative: Time-wasting prompt tweaking for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: When refactoring code I feel the most satisfied because it saves a loooot of time

nodes.label: AI as assistant for complex work
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see ai taking over complex software engineering

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saves a loooot of time

nodes.label: Code quality and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: code that is subpar in terms of quality

nodes.label: Professional autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I try to focus on good patterns of development and I try to focus on complex tasks

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for refactoring
nodes.grounding_span: When refactoring code I feel the most satisfied because it makes exactly what I want

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: The most frustrating part is when something very complex comes up and I spend a lot of time tweaking the prompt

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I often try to use it with caution

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I have to specify even more precisely what I need and then ask to give alternatives

nodes.label: Selective delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: I choose to do tasks that are simple to understand of medium complexity by myself
